mapper.select: SELECT id, phone, password, real_name, gender, user_type, status, last_login_time, last_login_ip, need_password_change, create_time, update_time, deleted FROM `user` WHERE phone = #{phone} AND deleted = 0
SELECT id, phone, password, real_name, gender, user_type, status, last_login_time, last_login_ip, need_password_change, create_time, update_time, deleted FROM `user` WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `user` (phone, password, real_name, gender, user_type, status, last_login_time, last_login_ip, need_password_change, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{phone}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{gender}, #{userType}, #{status}, #{lastLoginTime}, #{lastLoginIp}, #{needPasswordChange}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE `user` SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE `user` SET last_login_time = NOW(), last_login_ip = #{lastLoginIp} WHERE id = #{id}
